hooks.prompt: Check if the Bash command that just ran was a git commit (look for 'git commit' in the tool input). If it was NOT a git commit, do nothing — return empty output. If it WAS a git commit, remind the agent: 'A commit was just made. Update docs/agent/CURRENT_STATE.md to reflect what was committed — add to Recent Progress and remove any resolved blockers. Do NOT run a full memory rebuild, just update the state file.'
